case_title: SHARP, CAROLYN F. C. VS PANORAMA CAPITAL GROUP LLC DBA S.F. AIR TOURS

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SHARP, CAROLYN F. C. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PANORAMA CAPITAL GROUP LLC DBA S.F. AIR TOURS $731.12 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $731.12, PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM IS AMENDED TO CORRECT DEFT'S NAME TO: PANORAMA CAPITAL GROUP LLC DBA S.F. AIR TOURS. DEFENDANT APPEARS AT TRIAL, WAIVES SERVICE OF PROCESS AND NOTICE OF TRIAL. DEFENDANT ALICE TSE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS IMPROPERLY NAMED AS A PARTY. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

NOTICE OF APPEAL FILED BY DEFENDANT PANORAMA CAPITAL GROUP LLC DBA S.F. AIR TOURS
APPLICATION OF WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SHARP, CAROLYN F. C. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PANORAMA CAPITAL GROUP LLC DBA S.F. AIR TOURS $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $75.00, JUDGMENT ORDERED IN FAVOR OF APP/DEFT. AND AGAINST RESP/PLTF IN SCA 28408 ON 09/20/07. EXHIBITS RETURNED TO SMALL CLAIMS DIVISION.
